# CWE-1392 positive: default admin credentials (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1392-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1392: Use of Default Credentials.
// Vulnerable: bootstrap admin account always seeded with password "admin".

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

type AdminUserPure struct {
	Username string
	Password string
}

var adminMu sync.Mutex
var adminUserPure AdminUserPure

func BootstrapAdminPure() http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		adminMu.Lock()
		adminUserPure = AdminUserPure{Username: "admin", Password: "admin"}
		adminMu.Unlock()
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.Write([]byte(`{"admin_ready":true}`))
	}
}
